analysis: Ablation with pure Multiplicative Fusion: S = V_norm * T. Achieved 75.43% val accuracy. This drops performance relative to pure visual (75.65%), but is better than the linear combination alpha=0.5 (75.30%). The strict T=0 mask for different kingdoms does remove some spurious correlations but might overly penalize useful visual margin gradients.
